body.title: Delete deprecated skills; fold sprint; reconcile igor-diagnose
body.intention: I intend that no dead or redundant skill remains in either location.
body.description:
**Problem:** dead + redundant skills. Delete deprecated; fold the sprint wrapper; reconcile igor-diagnose vs diagnose.

**Shape:** Delete cognition-debug + debug-pe-chain (both self-labeled 'DEPRECATED — use /diagnose'). Fold `sprint` (= query-ticket + sprint-ticket) into a 2-line alias or delete it. Diff igor-diagnose vs diagnose; merge if redundant, else record why kept distinct.

**Affected files:** skills/ + ~/.claude/skills/ (cognition-debug, debug-pe-chain, sprint, igor-diagnose); skills/manifest.json.
**Design rules:** none apply (cleanup).
**Scope boundary:** IN — delete the 2 deprecated, resolve sprint + igor-diagnose. OUT — the view/workflow split.
**Test plan:** no tests because cleanup-only; verify manifest.json stays valid JSON and no surviving skill/doc references the deleted ones.
**Completion criteria:** cognition-debug + debug-pe-chain gone from BOTH locations + manifest; `sprint` resolved (deleted or thin alias, recorded which); igor-diagnose verdict recorded (merged into diagnose, or kept-distinct with reason).

## Akien 2026-06-24 — expanded retire list (unused / superseded skills)
Also retire these (each dead or superseded — confirm no surviving refs, then delete from repo skills/ + ~/.claude/skills/ + manifest):
- **/recover** — superseded by Anthropic's new built-in compact (we no longer drive the rewind-reorient flow). SUPERSEDES T-recover-skill-message-wording (that ticket becomes moot — discard it).
- **/question** — goal/question/concept tracking experiment retired; unused.
- **/concept** — same; unused.
- **/autocompact** (skill) + **devlab/claudecode/uucompactclaude** (shell script) — Anthropic's new compact removes the need; the tmux send-keys dance is obsolete. Check callers (savestate/day-close/sprint-batch reference /autocompact — repoint to the native compact or drop the call).
- **/migrate-decisions** — already self-labeled 'RETIRED as routine'; post-canonical-memory-consolidation decisions emit JSON directly via memory_emit, so even the one-time backfill is spent. Full retire.
(/goal retire + /audit-goal->/audit-intentions tracked on T-skills-goals-to-intentions.)
NOTE: retiring /autocompact has cross-skill blast radius (savestate/day-close/sprint-batch end-of-block calls) — sequence after confirming the native compact covers those exit points.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Deprecated cognition-debug + debug-pe-chain already deleted from repo + ~/.claude/skills + manifest (verified gone from all three). /sprint folded to a thin alias: selection now routes through /query-ticket (canonical), not a raw cc_queue.py list grep — guard test_sprint_selects_via_query_ticket (red->green proof 00bb3fad). igor-diagnose verdict: kept distinct — it is a self-deprecated redirect already superseded by /diagnose igor (the 'no hypothesis before traces' invariant is preserved in /diagnose Steps 1-3); it is a LOCAL-ONLY Igor-runtime skill, left in place per the two-tier rule, deletion deferred to the igor phase (igor = last priority). manifest.json valid JSON; no surviving skill references the deleted slash-commands (the two cognition-debug hits are MCP-capability/ticket refs, not the skill).
